---
title: "Semana 8 - Grafica de la recta de regresion lineal"
author: "RUIZ ACUÑA CAMILA LUCIANA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
#DATOS

x <- c(2,4,6,8,10)

y <- c(55,63,71,80,88)
```

```{r}
#Correlación de pearsson

cor(x,y)

#Obtener coeficientes de la regresión
#Modelo
modelo <- lm(y ~ x)
coef(modelo)

#Predicción para 12 horas de estudio
predict(modelo,data.frame(x=12))
```

```{r}
#gráfico

plot(x,y,main = "Hora de estudios vs Nota",
     
     xlab="Hora de estudios",
     
     ylab="Nota",
     
     pch=19)



abline(modelo,lwd=2)
```
